Article Title: We pass sweeping orders without realising impact on the ground: CJI
Article Text:
‘Justice Delayed Is Justice Destroyed’: CJI Kant Calls High Courts Key Guardians Of Citizens’ Rights

If police can’t verify complaint before FIR, who else will: SC

NEW DELHI: In an unusual introspective remark, Chief Justice Surya Kant-led bench of the Supreme Court on Friday said on several occasions the apex court passes sweeping orders unmindful of India’s social ground realities and without understanding their adverse impact on the social fabric.When a bunch of petitions challenging the validity of the sedition provision in BNS and a provision in BNSS allowing police to conduct preliminary inquiry prior to registration of FIR came up for hearing, senior advocate Menaka Guruswamy said permitting police to conduct preliminary inquiry prior to registration of FIR was in violation of SC ruling in the 2014 Lalita Kumari judgment.The SC in the 2014 judgment had ruled that if a complaint disclosed a cognizable offence, then the police must immediately register an FIR but can conduct preliminary inquiry into such complaints relating to matrimonial disputes, medical negligence and some other categories of cases.CJI Kant said, to test the validity of provisions of any new law, one must wait for a few years to observe its working and on finding lacunae; the same could be challenged. “Do you know how Lalita Kumari ruling is abused by filing frivolous cases for registration of FIRs? How judicial forums are abused,” he asked.The CJI said, “In some cases, we pass sweeping orders as if sitting in ivory towers and without realising the social realities in the country.Frivolous complaints lodged in the heat of the moment in rural areas, when converted to FIRs, have the potential of causing deep animosity in society.”Justice Kant said, “We pass sweeping orders in the name of protecting fundamental rights which in reality disturb the social fabric.” Guruswamy said how can the police have the power to determine the veracity of a complaint at the time of registration of FIR to argue that police can do so after registering the FIR.The bench said, “If police can’t determine the veracity of the complaint prior to converting it into an FIR, who else will?” Justice Bagchi said, “Lalita Kumar judgment gives the power of preliminary inquiry power to police in several categories of cases, including matrimonial disputes. Legislature has reflected this aspect in the law with respect to the degree of punishment provided for the offences. Such a provision cannot be at the teeth of Lalita Kumari judgment. ”Guruswamy argued that the sedition provision was incorporated in BNS despite Union govt undertaking before the SC not to do it. SC said, “Union govt can give such an undertaking. But Parliament is not bound by it. Parliament has the exclusive power to enact legislation. While testing its validity, SC can interpret and read it down.” It posted the petitions for a detailed hearing in March second week.
Article Summary: CJI Kant said, to test the validity of provisions of any new law, one must wait for a few years to observe its working and on finding lacunae. “Do you know how Lalita Kumari ruling is abused by filing frivolous cases for registration of FIRs? How judicial forums are abused,” he asked.

Article Title: A stuffed orangutan and shared grief
Article Text: Thirukkural with the Times explores real-world lessons from the classic Tamil text ‘Thirukkural’. Written by Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar, the Kural consists of 1,330 short couplets of seven words each. This text is divided into three books with teachings on virtue, wealth, and love and is considered one of the great works ever on ethics and morality. The Kural has influenced scholars and leaders across social, political, and philosophical spheres. Motivational speaker, author and diversity champion Bharathi Bhaskar explores the masterpiece. Recently, the internet found a new child to weep for — a seven-month-old baby macaque named Punch, who lives in the Ichikawa city zoo in Japan. Abandoned by his parents at birth and rejected by his clan, zookeepers gave him a stuffed orangutan toy for comfort. Punch clutched it instantly and carried it everywhere, running to it whenever threatened. Not long ago, a similar wave of emotion spread across the world for another solitary animal — the penguin that wandered away. Now it is Punch’s turn. Visitors flock to see him; strangers from abroad send identical plush toys in case his toy wears out. But the tears shed for him go beyond a love for animals. People see themselves in the tiny creature, their own histories of rejection, humiliation, subtle bullying by dominant members, exclusion for being different in appearance, caste, creed, accent or gender. The new employee who eats lunch alone after others leave, for example, the daughter-in-law entering an established household, the migrant, the misfit, the outsider who hears, in countless small ways, “you don’t belong here”. I remember such an exile of my own. When I changed schools in Class IX, I left behind the comfort of familiar friends. The new class felt closed against me. Mornings were heavy with dread. It took an academic breakthrough — outdoing established toppers in the first examination — to gain acceptance. Friendships eventually formed; warmth returned. Yet, decades later, the chill remains vivid. Watching Punch flee to his toy, I recognise that search for something that will not reject us when the social world turns cold. Vaishnavite tradition offers a telling metaphor: markata nyayam and marjala nyayam. The baby monkey clings to its mother; the kitten is carried by the mother cat. The devotee may hold to the divine, or the divine may hold the devotee. Punch lost, or was denied, that primal grip. His plushie became the body he could hold. Zoo authorities call the clan’s behaviour normal. In primate hierarchies, difference is rarely tolerated at first. They expect that, in time, Punch will learn to cope and find his place. Perhaps one day he will no longer need the toy. We have seen that moment in our own homes: the doll we once clutched in sleep, the blanket dragged everywhere. Then, quietly, we stopped asking for it. The toy remains in a cupboard, then a box, then — during house cleaning — is given away. Parents pause, holding it, feeling the ache of abandonment which comes with growth. So too with Punch. There will likely come a day when the orange companion is no longer his world. But today, it is his lifeline. And in that image lies something universal: every life form needs something — or someone — to cling to. Attachment is not weakness; it is the root of survival. Whether it is a mother’s body, a friend’s presence, a belief, a memory, or even a toy, love is the sustaining grip that keeps existence from falling into emptiness. Thiruvalluvar saw this with piercing clarity. In Kural 78, he wrote: Anbagathu Illaa Uyirvaazhkkai Vanpaarkkan Vatral Maramthalirth Thatru A life without love to hold it, is like a withered tree struggling in wilderness To sprout in arid ground Punch clings to an orange toy. We cling to less visible forms of love. The gesture is the same — and it is what keeps us all alive.
Article Summary: Bharathi Bhaskar explores real-world lessons from the classic Tamil text ‘Thirukkural’ Written by Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar, the Kural consists of 1,330 short couplets of seven words each. It is considered one of the great works ever on ethics and morality.

Article Title: Rinku Singh’s father Khanchand Singh passes away after cancer battle
Article Text:
Rinku Singh (Getty Images)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

A father’s sacrifice behind Rinku’s rise

NEW DELHI: Indian cricketer Rinku Singh suffered a heartbreaking personal loss on Friday morning as his father, Khanchand Singh, passed away at Yatharth Hospital in Greater Noida after battling advanced-stage liver cancer. He was on ventilator support for the past few days, hospital officials confirmed.Dr Sunil Kumar, spokesperson of the hospital, said Khanchand Singh’s condition had deteriorated significantly after being admitted on February 21. “He was placed on ventilator support and breathed his last early this morning,” Kumar stated. Family sources also confirmed the news, saying he had been fighting liver cancer for some time.Rinku, who is part of India’s T20 World Cup squad, had briefly returned home earlier in the tournament after his father’s health worsened following India’s Super 8 fixture against South Africa. Despite the emotional turmoil, the 28-year-old rejoined the squad in Chennai ahead of the Zimbabwe clash on February 26. Though he did not feature in the playing XI, he was present with the team during India’s convincing win.Former India spinner Harbhajan Singh expressed his condolences in a heartfelt post on X. “Pained to learn about the demise of Shri Khanchand Singh Ji, father of Rinku Singh. This must be an especially difficult time for Rinku and his family… May Waheguru grant eternal peace to the departed soul and give strength and courage to the bereaved family,” he wrote.Rinku’s former coach, Masood Amini, also confirmed the passing, noting that Khanchand Singh had been on ventilator support for the last three to four days.A resident of Aligarh in Uttar Pradesh, Rinku has often spoken about his father’s sacrifices. Khanchand Singh worked in gas cylinder distribution and supported his son’s cricketing ambitions despite financial hardships. In a touching moment last year, he attended Rinku’s engagement ceremony in Lucknow, even while battling illness. The cricketer is engaged to Samajwadi Party MP Priya Saroj.The last rites will be performed in Aligarh later in the day, with Rinku expected to attend.As India prepare for their upcoming clash against West Indies, cricket takes a backseat for the young batter, who now mourns the loss of the man he credits as his biggest pillar of strength.
Article Summary: Indian cricketer Rinku Singh's father, Khanchand Singh, passes away at hospital. The 28-year-old was battling advanced-stage liver cancer. He was on ventilator support for the past few days, hospital officials confirmed.

Article Title: Matthew Tkachuk calls Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid best player in the world
Article Text:
Matthew Tkachuk #19 of the Florida Panthers and Stuart Skinner #74 of the Edmonton Oilers shake hands after Game Six of the 2025 Stanley Cup Final between the Edmonton Oilers and the Florida Panthers at Amerant Bank Arena on June 17, 2025 in Sunrise, Florida. The Panthers won the Stanley Cup Final series 4-2. (Photo by Brian Babineau/NHLI via Getty Images)

Matthew Tkachuk on Connor McDavid 's Olympic gold medal game



Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk did not hesitate when asked to describe his longtime rival following the Olympic final. Despite years of intense playoff battles, Tkachuk openly labeled Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid as the best player in the world after their latest showdown on international ice.The praise came after Team USA’s dramatic victory over Canada in the gold medal game at the Milano Cortina 2026 Olympic Winter Games, adding another chapter to a rivalry shaped by Stanley Cup Finals clashes and high-stakes NHL matchups.After Team USA's close win over Canada, Matthew Tkachuk talked openly about how Connor McDavid has changed the game. The Florida Panthers star said that no other player has the same speed, vision, and puck control as the captain of the Edmonton Oilers.Tkachuk's words came after a key moment in the gold medal game. McDavid broke in alone on United States goaltender Connor Hellebuyck while Canada was behind and the game was still up for grabs. The play could have changed the course of the game and the story of the tournament.Instead, Hellebuyck made a key save that kept the Americans' small lead. Tkachuk later called the moment a turning point and said that stopping a player like McDavid on a breakaway takes calmness and perfect timing.The Florida Panthers forward said that if McDavid had scored, it might have changed the mood of the game. With veteran leader Sidney Crosby out because of an injury, the focus naturally turned to the captain of the Edmonton Oilers to step up for Canada.Team USA won gold in the end, but Tkachuk made it clear that he still respects McDavid. Their rivalry, which started in the Stanley Cup Finals and has continued through tough NHL games, is still a big part of this era of hockey.Tkachuk's comments are a reminder for fans who read the latest NHL news and updates: even fierce rivals can see greatness when they see it.
Article Summary: Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk called Edmonton Oilers captain Connor McDavid the best player in the world. The praise came after Team USA’s dramatic victory over Canada in the gold medal game at the Milano Cortina 2026 Olympic Winter Games. The Florida Panthers forward said that if McDavid had scored, it might have changed the mood of the game.

Article Title: Lionel Messi knocked down by fan during Inter Miami match - Watch
Article Text:
Inter Miami forward Lionel Messi (10) reacts on the ground after a play during the second half of an MLS soccer match against Los Angeles FC, Saturday, Feb. 21, 2026, in Los Angeles, Calif. (AP Photo)

Lionel Messi was brought down after a fan ran onto the field at the end of Inter Miami CF’s friendly match against Independiente del Valle in Puerto Rico on Thursday.The incident took place around the 88th minute at Juan Ramón Loubriel Stadium in Bayamón. A supporter ran towards the centre circle and grabbed Messi by the waist from behind. A security guard tried to remove the fan, and in the process both the fan and Messi fell to the ground. Messi appeared unharmed. He got up quickly and walked away to another part of the pitch.One fan had approached him from behind without him noticing. As the supporter held him, a security official intervened. The attempt to pull the fan away led to Messi also being knocked down. The fan was unable to take a selfie. Several supporters entered the pitch during the exhibition match.The game had originally been scheduled for February 13 but was postponed after Messi felt discomfort in his leg during a previous exhibition fixture against Barcelona SC.Santiago Morales and Messi scored in the 16th and 70th minutes as Inter Miami won 2-1.Miami had begun its MLS season with a 3-0 defeat to Los Angeles FC and will next play Orlando City SC on Sunday.
Article Summary: Lionel Messi was brought down after a fan ran onto the field at the end of Inter Miami CF’s friendly match against Independiente del Valle in Puerto Rico on Thursday. The incident took place around the 88th minute at Juan Ramón Loubriel Stadium in Bayamón. Several supporters entered the pitch during the exhibition match.

Article Title: India vs Pakistan T20 World Cup final loading? The exact scenario explained
Article Text:
AFP Photo

India land in Kolkata for do-or-die WI clash | Semi-final spot on the line

India’s T20 World Cup semifinal qualification scenario



Can India and Pakistan meet again in T20 World Cup?



Could the cricket world be set for another blockbuster India vs Pakistan showdown at the T20 World Cup 2026? The possibility is still alive — but several pieces must fall into place.So far, South Africa national cricket team and England cricket team have confirmed their semi-final berths. That leaves two spots up for grabs, with India national cricket team, West Indies cricket team, Pakistan national cricket team and New Zealand national cricket team still in contention.England booked their place in the last four after a tense four-wicket win over New Zealand at the R Premadasa Stadium in Colombo, completing the Super Eights stage unbeaten with three wins from three matches to top Group 2.New Zealand sit second with three points. Pakistan, meanwhile, remain mathematically alive — but only just.For Pakistan to qualify, they must beat Sri Lanka in their final Super Eight fixture — and by a massive margin. Their Net Run Rate of -0.461 pales in comparison to New Zealand’s +1.390. Pakistan need a thumping win over Zimbabwe on Saturday.India, the defending champions, responded in style with a dominant 72-run victory over Zimbabwe at the MA Chidambaram Stadium.After West Indies’ heavy defeat to South Africa, the equation is simple for the Suryakumar Yadav-led side: defeat West Indies in their final Super Eight clash at Eden Gardens on March 1 and they are through to the semi-finals — irrespective of the margin.However, if rain forces a washout, West Indies would move to three points and seal qualification instead.An India-Pakistan clash is possible — but only if both teams make the knockouts.If Pakistan somehow finish in the top two of Group 2 and India qualify from their group, the two sides could face off in:The semi-final — depending on final group positions.The final — if both teams win their respective semi-finals.At present, India’s route appears clear-cut. Pakistan, on the other hand, require a dominant display and favourable results elsewhere to keep alive hopes of another high-voltage encounter between cricket’s fiercest rivals.
Article Summary: India and Pakistan could meet in the semi-finals of the T20 World Cup 2026. South Africa and England have confirmed their semi-final berths. That leaves two spots up for grabs, with India, West Indies, Pakistan and New Zealand still in contention.

Article Title: T20 World Cup 2026 Super 8 Points Table: India set for virtual quarterfinal as South Africa seal semis spot
Article Text:
Team India (Pic credit: BCCI)

Go Beyond The Boundary with our YouTube channel.

India keep T20 World Cup dream alive, over to Kolkata now

T20 World Cup Super 8 Group 1 Points Table

P W L NR Points NRR South Africa (Q) 2 2 0 0 4 +2.890 West Indies 2 1 1 0 2 +1.791 India 2 1 1 0 2 -0.100 Zimbabwe (E) 2 0 2 0 0 -4.475

T20 World Cup Super 8 Group 2 Points Table



P W L NR Points NRR England (Q) 3 3 0 0 6 +1.491 New Zealand 3 1 1 1 3 +1.390 Pakistan 2 0 1 1 1 -0.461 Sri Lanka (E) 2 0 2 0 0 -2.800

NEW DELHI: The Super 8 stage of the ICC Men's T20 World Cup has reached its decisive phase, and the latest points table leaves defending champions India with a clear equation — beat West Indies on Sunday and book a place in the semi-finals.Group 1 witnessed a dramatic shake-up on Thursday. South Africa stormed into the last four with a commanding nine-wicket win over West Indies in Ahmedabad, chasing down 177 in just 16.1 overs. A blistering 95-run opening stand between Aiden Markram (82 not out) and Quinton de Kock (47) set the tone, while Ryan Rickelton’s unbeaten 45 sealed the deal as the Proteas finished at 177/1. The victory extended South Africa’s unbeaten run in the tournament and confirmed their semi-final berth.India, meanwhile, kept their title defence alive with a thumping 72-run victory over Zimbabwe in Chennai. That result, coupled with South Africa’s dominance, has set up a virtual quarterfinal between India and West Indies at Eden Gardens on Sunday. Both teams sit on two points from two matches, making it a straight shootout for the second semi-final spot from Group 1.While South Africa face Zimbabwe in their final Super 8 fixture, all eyes will be on Kolkata, where the winner of India vs West Indies will advance.In Group 2, England beat New Zealand by four wickets to stay unbeaten in the Super Eights and keep Pakistan’s semifinal hopes alive.After restricting New Zealand to 159/7, England chased down 161/6 in 19.3 overs. New Zealand remain second, while Pakistan must win big against Sri Lanka to qualify for the semifinals.With knockout spots on the line and net run rates in play, the race to the semi-finals is now at boiling point. Sunday’s India-West Indies clash promises to decide more than just two points — it will determine who keeps their World Cup dream alive.
Article Summary: India keep T20 World Cup dream alive, over to Kolkata now. South Africa stormed into the last four with a commanding nine-wicket win over West Indies in Ahmedabad. India, meanwhile, kept their title defence alive with a thumping 72-run victory over Zimbabwe in Chennai.

Article Title: Tyrese Haliburton's fiancee Jade Jones issues heartfelt gesture for Indiana Pacers star's 26th birthday
Article Text:
Jade Jones and Tyrese Haliburton (Image via getty)

Jade Jones posts image of customized cake on Tyrese Haliburton 's 26th birthday

Image via Jade Jones/Instagram (screengrab)

When are Tyrese Haliburton and Jade Jones getting married?

Tyrese Haliburton and Jade Jones are one of the most talked-about couples in the NBA . The duo have showcased their appreciation towards each other publicly on multiple occasions. Recently, Jones posted an image on Instagram . She celebrated the Indiana Pacers star’s birthday with a heartfelt gesture. Tyrese turned 26 this year.Tyrese and Jade started dating in the year 2019. They met during their college days in Iowa. Jones is a schoolteacher. Despite their demanding careers, the duo have managed to show their support towards each other. On July 28, 2025, the Indiana Pacers star proposed to his girlfriend and since then, fans have been eagerly waiting for the announcement of their marriage dates.An interesting fact about Tyrese Haliburton is that his birthday is on February 29. He was born in the year 2000. Since the day comes only once every four years, his birthday is celebrated during the last couple of days in the month of February. The Indiana Pacers star’s fiancée, Jade Jones, carried out a heartfelt gesture this year, too. She posted an adorable picture on her Instagram story. The story featured a birthday cake with “Happy Birthday” written on it. It also had the candles representing the 26th birthday of the athlete.What made the cake even more adorable was the fact that it was a customized one with Tyrese’s childhood picture printed on it.It wasn’t any other picture. The image went viral way before when the Pacers star had uploaded it after winning Gold in the Olympics with LeBron James. In the image, young Tyrese could be seen wearing a LeBron jersey. This indicated how the young athlete had forever idolized the NBA legend.This is not the first time Jade has shown her appreciation for the athlete publicly. The duo have constantly sent subtle gestures towards each other since their relationship went public. Their way of mutual appreciation and adorable gestures has made them one of the favorite couples within the league.Tyrese Haliburton and Jade Jones have been dating each other since their college days. The Indiana Pacers star proposed to Jones in the month of July, 2025. Since then, fans have been wondering about the possible dates when the duo would get hitched. Recently, Jones posted on Instagram, revealing the year in which they would get married. Captioning the post, Jones wrote, “2026 the year I become a wifeyyy.” Now that the year is known, the wait is for the specific date when the couple will tie the knot forever.
Article Summary: Jade Jones posts image of customized cake on Tyrese Haliburton's 26th birthday. She celebrated the Indiana Pacers star’s birthday with a heartfelt gesture. Tyrene and Jade started dating in the year 2019. On July 28, 2025, the IndianaPacers star proposed to Jones.

Article Title: Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event (February 28, 2026): Release timings for all regions
Article Text:
Image via Fortnite

Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour start timings for all regions

Epic Games has announced the two final Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour events, and they place on February 28, 2026, and March 1, 2026, respectively. This marks the end of the Valentine's Day celebration that kept the player base engaged in the battle royale title throughout February.The developers have confirmed that this Power Hour features the most generous loot distribution of the entire event series, and there are going to be four Legendary POIs per match, containing almost exclusively Rare Chests. You will have one final opportunity to get Candy Hearts and get the themed cosmetic items.The section below takes a look at the start timings for the Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event.The February 28 Power Hour marks the end of a month-long Valentine's celebration in Fortnite. It features the Arc-Lightning Gun as the starting weapon alongside the Self-Revive Device. The Power Hour also features rectangular-shaped storm circles, and you will have to tactically make rotations, keeping them in mind.Additionally, there will be four Legendary POIs spawning per match, giving you access to high-tier loot. However, you can expect a lot of people coming over there, resulting in consistent fights.Coming to the timings, the Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event for February 28, 2026, begins at 3:30 PM ET. Here are the start timings for all the major regions:Keep in mind that the Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour event will be active for only 1 hour. If you miss out on the same, there are no reruns, and you will have to wait for the final Power Hour, which takes place on Sunday, March 1.Additionally, the Rocket Mini Event will also replay at 3:30 PM ET, and you can tune in to watch it. Doing so will end up providing you with a new loading screen.
Article Summary: Epic Games has announced the two final Fortnite Love and Legends Power Hour events. They take place on February 28 and March 1, 2026, respectively. The February 28 Power Hour marks the end of a month-long Valentine's celebration. It features the Arc-Lightning Gun and Self-Revive Device as the starting weapons.

Article Title: LaTroy Lewis: Why did the Atlanta Falcons fire LaTroy Lewis weeks after hiring him? Police investigation over disturbing allegations explained
Article Text:
LaTroy Lewis. Image via: AP

The Atlanta Falcons fired LaTroy Lewis



What did the police say about LaTroy Lewis' investigation?



Is Sherrone Moore linked to the investigation?



Sherrone Moore. Image via: Al Goldis/ AP

The Atlanta Falcons moved quickly on Feb. 27, cutting assistant defensive line coach LaTroy Lewis hours after acknowledging they were reviewing serious allegations tied to his time at Michigan. The decision followed confirmation from the Ann Arbor Police Department that Lewis is under investigation for an alleged se*ual assault reported to have occurred on December 5, 2024.Lewis had recently joined Atlanta’s staff after coaching stops at Michigan and Toledo. His firing came the same day police publicly confirmed an active investigation. The situation has since expanded beyond the NFL, drawing responses from university officials, attorneys, and prosecutors as questions grow around how earlier complaints were handled.The Falcons hired LaTroy Lewis earlier this offseason as part of their defensive staff. By Friday afternoon, he was gone. The team first said it was aware of the allegations and gathering information. Later that day, it announced his dismissal.The accusations stem from Lewis’ tenure at Michigan, where he worked from 2022 through early 2025 under Jim Harbaugh and later Sherrone Moore. According to the accuser’s attorney, the woman met Lewis through a dating app and alleged that an assault occurred during a December 2024 meeting in Ann Arbor.“He r**ed her, assaulted her, beat her up,” attorney Karen Truszkowski said (via The Athletic).Lewis’ attorney, Fabiola A. Galguera, rejected the claims in a statement: "Allegations of se*ual misconduct are not proof of se*ual misconduct. It is essential to pass judgment based on facts, and the facts are currently not being presented to the public. Mr. Lewis intends to fiercely fight these false allegations with the support of his wife, family, and my team."A personal protective order case was initiated in Washtenaw County court, though records were not publicly available at the time of reporting.Police confirmed the case remains active. Chris Page of the Ann Arbor Police Department stated: "The Ann Arbor Police Department was just recently made aware of allegations regarding a se*ual assault reported to have occurred on December 5, 2024. The suspect in this investigation is LaTroy Lewis. The AAPD Detective Bureau launched an immediate investigation into the incident. This investigation remains active and ongoing. "The Washtenaw County prosecutor’s office clarified its role, stating it "is not an investigatory body." Spokeswoman Liz Mack added, "Law-enforcement investigates alleged criminal conduct, and, following an investigation, may submit evidence regarding potential criminal activity to our office for review," and, "As with any case, if a report is submitted, we will review the evidence and make a determination based on the facts and the law. "The accuser alleges she informed Moore about the incident shortly after it occurred and claims he did not report it through proper university channels. Her attorney said, “As a lay person, she assumed that because he was the head football coach that he would want to address it, knowing it was one of his coaches that had done this,” and further alleged, “Instead of being supportive and reporting it, as he was required to do, he started to weaponize it against her. ”Moore’s attorney, Ellen Michaels, denied those claims: "Sherrone Moore did not fail to report misconduct, did not reward wrongdoing, and did not harass anyone. These claims are false."The University of Michigan called the allegations “deeply concerning.” Spokesperson Paul Corliss said that the University launched an investigation of “the circumstances and conduct leading to Sherrone Moore’s firing, as well as a broader culture review of the Athletic Department.”The investigation remains ongoing.
Article Summary: The Atlanta Falcons fired assistant defensive line coach LaTroy Lewis on Friday. The decision followed confirmation from the Ann Arbor Police Department that Lewis is under investigation for an alleged se*ual assault reported to have occurred on December 5, 2024. The accusations stem from Lewis’ tenure at Michigan, where he worked from 2022 through early 2025 under Jim Harbaugh and later Sherrone Moore.

Article Title: “Clinging to scraps”: Bill Belichick stuns fans with new look while attending a game with 24-year-old girlfriend Jordon Hudson
Article Text:
Bill Belichick stuns fans with new look while attending a game with 24-year old girlfriend Jordon Hudson (Getty Images)

Bill Belichick’s longer hairstyle steals the spotlight in the stands as he attends the game with his girlfriend, Jordon Hudson

Bill Belichick has stayed in headlines well beyond the sidelines. Over the past two years, much of that attention has centered on his relationship with Jordon Hudson. The 73-year-old coach and the 24-year-old former college cheerleader first drew public interest after their romance became official in June 2024. Since then, every joint appearance has fueled debate and curiosity.Recently, the head coach was spotted at a game with Hudson, and this time it was not just their presence that caught attention. Belichick showed up with a noticeably new hairstyle. The look quickly went viral online and broke the internet with multiple reactions.Belichick kept his outfit simple, wearing a dark short-sleeve zip-up over a blue shirt. However, his grooming told a different story. He appears to be growing his hair long, with fuller strands brushing around the sides and back instead of the tight, cropped style fans knew from his New England Patriots era. The longer hair gave him a more relaxed, almost off-duty look as he greeted people and moved through the seating area with Hudson, who was dressed in all black and wore sunglasses to complete her look.As the look went viral, many fans poured in their reactions. A fan said, “Clinging to scraps.”Another added, “Yikes, Bill is growing his hair out. Guess what, BIG DEAL, HE CAN DO WHATEVER HE WANTS; HE IS AN ADULT.”One more fan added, “Bill Belichick with long hair?! 😳 Never thought we’d see the day… the man’s legendary on the field AND now making headlines off it too! 🏈👀" A folk added, "They make a nice couple."Their relationship has stayed under the microscope. Reports state they first met in February 2021 on a flight from the Boston area to Florida. They were later seen together in January 2023, months before news of their romance surfaced publicly. Hudson, a former Bridgewater State University cheerleader and 2021 NCA Collegiate Champion, has supported Belichick at several major events, including NFL Honors in February 2025 and public outings tied to his coaching career.Public scrutiny has followed them, especially regarding their age gap. In April 2025, during a CBS Sunday Morning interview, Hudson firmly shut down personal questions about their relationship. Belichick later defended her in a statement, clarifying that he had asked for the focus to remain on his book.Now, with his long hair becoming a viral talking point, Belichick once again finds himself at the center of online chatter. This time, it is not about defense schemes or Super Bowl rings. It is about a hairstyle that signals a visible shift in the image of one of football’s most recognizable figures.
Article Summary: Bill Belichick was spotted at a game with his girlfriend, Jordon Hudson. Belichick showed up with a noticeably new hairstyle. The look quickly went viral online and broke the internet with multiple reactions. The 73-year-old coach and Hudson, 24, first drew public interest after their romance became official in June 2024.

Article Title: Ex-captain Sourav Ganguly's message to India selectors: Take Auqib Nabi to England
Article Text:
Photo/Agencies

India keep T20 World Cup dream alive, over to Kolkata now

'England is the place to start in the summer,' said former India captain Sourav Ganguly, backing Jammu and Kashmir pacer Auqib Nabi for national selection after his five-wicket haul in the Ranji Trophy final against Karnataka at the KSCA Hubli Cricket Ground on Friday.Nabi returned figures of 5/54 in 23 overs as J&K bowled Karnataka out for 293 to secure a first-innings lead of 291 runs in the summit clash. He now leads the wicket charts this season with 60 wickets in 10 matches at an average of 12.56, including seven five-wicket hauls.In a post on X, Ganguly said Nabi should be considered for India’s white-ball tour of England in July 2026, where India are scheduled to play five T20Is and three ODIs. The series will be part of preparations for the 2027 ODI World Cup in South Africa."J&K has shown the world what effort and intent can do ..They have made that region so proud of them. Tough environment makes tough people. Aqib nabi on his way to national colours. England is the place to start in the summer," Ganguly wrote.With only a few sessions left in the final, a draw appears likely, which would hand Jammu and Kashmir their maiden Ranji Trophy title on the basis of the first-innings lead.Earlier, former India wicketkeeper Dinesh Karthik had also praised Nabi’s season, noting that he has featured in all matches and performed across conditions."Watching this Ranji Trophy campaign and following it closely, one thing I can say for certain, for all the young boys and girls out there playing this sport and wanting to represent the country, do it the AAQIB NABI way. Can't think of any pacer/player in a long time doing what he's done," he wrote on X."Domination from start to end and almost single-handedly winning the domestic tournament that matters the most to get into the national side," he wrote."Fitness across the whole campaign, bowling those long spells and across different soils and weather conditions and whether there's been any help for a pacer or not, he's been there for his team with the belief every time he's had the ball to STRIKE for his team."Hats off to you, AAQIB, you're an absolute champion and hope you get a lot of success that comes your way and may you be the lesson on how it's done to break the doors through sheer will power, skill and resilience," he added.
Article Summary: J&K bowled Karnataka out for 293 to secure a first-innings lead of 291 runs in the summit clash. He now leads the wicket charts this season with 60 wickets in 10 matches at an average of 12.56. Ganguly said Nabi should be considered for India’s white-ball tour of England in 2026.

Article Title: NFL Trade News: Tremaine Edmunds trade buzz grows as Chicago Bears weigh $15 million move and early Day 3 pick return
Article Text:
NFL Trade News: Tremaine Edmunds trade buzz grows as Chicago Bears weigh $15 million move and early Day 3 pick return (Image via Getty)

Albert Breer of Sports Illustrated predicts early Day 3 pick return for Chicago Bears Pro Bowl linebacker Tremaine Edmunds



Tremaine Edmunds is suddenly at the center of a big decision in Chicago. The Chicago Bears are trying to fix their roster and manage money as they think about becoming real Super Bowl contenders. One name now linked to trade talks is 27 year old Pro Bowl linebacker Tremaine Edmunds, who is set to make $15 million this season. According to Albert Breer of Sports Illustrated, Edmunds could bring back an “early Day 3” draft pick if the Bears move him. That means a fourth or fifth round pick.For Chicago, that would be a solid return. The team has been connected to trade rumors around DJ Moore, Gervon Dexter and Tyson Bagent, but Breer believes Edmunds is the most likely to move. The reason is simple. The Bears may want to clear salary space, and Edmunds carries a large cap number. If they can trade him instead of cutting him, they would at least get something in return.Albert Breer wrote, “And so as the Bears seek a potential trade partner to shed a little salary, there should be a market for the big, athletic, still relatively young linebacker. What sort of return will Edmunds bring? My guess is that an early Day 3 pick is how most teams would value him.”That prediction matters. If the Chicago Bears can land a fourth or fifth round pick for Tremaine Edmunds, it would be seen as a win for general manager Ryan Poles. Edmunds is viewed as a possible cut candidate if no trade happens. So getting any draft value instead of releasing him for nothing would help.On the field, Edmunds has shown strong production. In 13 games, he recorded 112 total tackles, four interceptions, nine passes defended, one sack, three tackles for loss and three quarterback hits. In coverage, he allowed a 77.7 quarterback rating, which is considered very good for an off ball linebacker. Those numbers could attract teams that need help in pass defense.Still, his $15 million salary is a key factor. Some teams might wait to see if he is released. But if a team truly wants him, trading for him removes the risk of losing him in free agency. For now, Albert Breer’s report gives the Bears hope that there is a real market for their Pro Bowl linebacker.
Article Summary: Albert Breer of Sports Illustrated predicts early Day 3 pick return for Chicago Bears Pro Bowl linebacker Tremaine Edmunds. Edmunds could bring back an “early Day 3” draft pick if the Bears move him. That means a fourth or fifth round pick.

Article Title: How to find Sun, Moon, and Star Quartz in Resident Evil Requiem
Article Text:
Image via Capcom

Solving the Rhodes Hill Care Center in Resident Evil Requiem



ALL Quartz Locations (Moon Quartz, Sun Quartz, Star Quartz) Resident Evil 9 Requiem

How to get the Moon Quartz in Resident Evil Requiem



How to get the Sun Quartz in Resident Evil Requiem



How to get the Star Quartz in Resident Evil Requiem



Resident Evil Requiem is filled with a variety of puzzles, and you have to solve them to proceed ahead with the story. Among the first major puzzles for protagonist Grace Ashcroft takes place inside the Rhodes Hill Care Center, and it requires you to unlock the Central Hall door.However, unlocking the particular door is not that easy, and you essentially need to get the Moon, Sun, and Star Quartz. To complete this puzzle, you have to navigate through the facility’s wings and locate three Puzzle Boxes belonging to key staff members.In this guide, we take a look at how you can find the Moon, Sun, and Star Quartz in Resident Evil Requiem.The Rhodes Hill Care Center in Resident Evil Requiem can get a bit confusing if you don’t pay a lot of attention. As already specified, you have to find the Moon, Sun, and Star Quartz and unlock the Central Hall door.Once you manage to achieve the same, you will be able to proceed.First, you have to retrieve the West Wing Keycard from a corpse located in the Medication Room, which will enable you to head into the West Wing. You must subsequently pass through the Kitchen by aggravating the Zombie Chef so he moves his cart, and proceed upstairs to the Chairman’s Office on the second floor.After getting inside, use a Pencil found in the back of the room on a torn notebook to reveal the box's combination: Moon, Sun, Star, Moon. You can finally input this code into the Puzzle Box to claim the Moon Quartz. Before leaving, ensure that you grab the Unicorn Trinket Box and open its back to obtain the Red Jewel.To get started, you should use the Red Jewel to unlock the Unicorn Door in the West Wing, which leads to the Parlor. Next, you should grab the East Wing Keycard from a severed arm under a table and head over to the East Wing. While proceeding ahead, carefully dodge the Chunk enemy upstairs to secure the Level 1 ID Wristband (Keycard) from a corpse.You should then enter the Lead Researcher's Office and find a padlocked Puzzle Box. Fetch Corrosive liquid from the nearby Conference Room to melt the lock off. By piecing together three photographs found in the office, you can deduce the code: Star, Sun, Moon, Sun. Opening this box grants you the Sun Quartz and a note on how to unlock the Organ Transport Box.Using your Level 1 Keycard, you must enter the Custodian's Office in the West Wing to grab a Wrench. Next, visit the Garage to collect the Organ Transport Box, making sure to shoot the zombie driving a digger toward you. You will then have to use the Wrench and open Cold Storage to get the Artificial Heart. Lastly, you can follow the instructions that appear on your note to open the Transport Box and get the Artificial Lungs.After you have the organs, take them to the Examination Room in the East Wing and place them into the organless corpse. Once you are done with it, you will have to defeat the reanimated zombie to claim the Level 2 Keycard. This provides you access to the Isolation Ward and the Security Manager's Office.A journal there reveals the code (Star, Star, Moon, Sun), but the third Puzzle Box is written in Braille. As a result, you will have to grab the Level 3 Keycard from the manager's corpse, return to the Medication Room to free a girl named Emily from her cell, and carry her back to the office so she can read the Braille and finally secure the Star Quartz for you.
Article Summary: Resident Evil Requiem is filled with a variety of puzzles, and you have to solve them to proceed ahead with the story. Among the first major puzzles for protagonist Grace Ashcroft takes place inside the Rhodes Hill Care Center. In this guide, we take a look at how you can find the Moon, Sun, and Star Quartz in the game.

Article Title: NFL Rumors: Patriots set to pair Stefon Diggs and A.J. Brown with Drake Maye
Article Text:
Image via AP Photo

What reports say about Stefon Diggs vs. A.J. Brown pairing

What it means for Drake Maye and the Patriots’ offense

The New England Patriots might be getting ready to make big changes to their offense before the 2026 NFL season. Several rumors say that the team is looking at trading for Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown so that he may play with Stefon Diggs and inexperienced quarterback Drake Maye.After falling short in the Super Bowl, New England is expected to be aggressive in reshaping its roster, particularly at wide receiver. While Diggs led the team in production last season, the Patriots’ passing attack lacked consistent firepower, prompting the front office to evaluate elite options on the trade market.According to insiders, the Patriots have internal interest in trading for Brown, who remains one of the NFL’s top wideouts. The move would likely depend on contract adjustments, particularly Diggs potentially restructuring his deal to create salary-cap flexibility.Diggs is scheduled to carry a significant cap hit for the 2026 season, but he was still New England’s most productive receiver in 2025 with over 1,000 receiving yards. Rather than moving on from him, the team reportedly sees a scenario where both receivers can coexist.The Patriots’ leadership has also pointed to existing relationships as a factor.Head coach Mike Vrabel previously worked with Brown during their time with the Tennessee Titans, and that connection could play a role if trade talks advance.For Drake Maye, the addition of another elite receiver could accelerate his growth as the team’s franchise quarterback. Young passers often benefit from experienced playmakers, and a Diggs-Brown tandem would give New England one of the most balanced receiving groups in the league.Last season, the Patriots had trouble being consistent on offense, especially in important games. A better group of receivers might help open up the field, make the red zone more effective, and take some of the load off Maye to run the offense by himself.However, several hurdles remain. Philadelphia has not signaled strong willingness to move Brown, and any deal would require significant draft capital along with financial adjustments. Eagles general manager Howie Roseman recently emphasized Brown’s importance to the team, suggesting a trade is possible but unlikely without a compelling offer.Still, the idea of Diggs and Brown lining up together continues to generate buzz around the league. If New England can pull off the trade, it may be one of the most important personnel changes of the offseason and change how people think about the Patriots going into 2026.
Article Summary: The New England Patriots are reportedly looking at trading for Philadelphia Eagles wide receiver A.J. Brown. The move would likely depend on contract adjustments, particularly Diggs potentially restructuring his deal to create salary-cap flexibility. A Diggs-Brown tandem would give New England one of the most balanced receiving groups in the league.

Article Title: Fifa: FIFA World Cup chaos in Foxborough as town refuses license without $8 million security promise from Robert Kraft
Article Text:
FIFA World Cup chaos in Foxborough as town refuses license without $8 million security promise from Robert Kraft (Image Via Getty Images)





Foxborough select board vice chairman Bill Yunka and local business owner Terri Lawton speak out on Robert Kraft and World Cup costs

The clock is ticking with the World Cup just over 100 days away, but in Foxborough, Massachusetts, growing tension surrounds Robert Kraft and his stadium.The small town of 18,000 people has refused to approve a license for World Cup matches at Gillette Stadium unless someone agrees to cover an 8 million dollar security bill. The stadium, home of the New England Patriots, is set to host seven matches starting June 13, including knockout games. But town leaders say they cannot risk bankruptcy to make it happen.The issue is simple. Under Fifa’s agreement, host cities must pay for police, public safety, and security. In the NFL season, the Kraft Group handles those costs. For the World Cup, the stadium is leased to Fifa, and the financial responsibility shifts. The five member Foxborough select board has set a March 17 deadline to approve the license. Without financial guarantees, they say the doors could stay closed.Vice Chairman Bill Yunka told local outlet WCVB that hosting the World Cup would be like staging “an NFL game on steroids” and equal to “39 Super Bowls.” Fifa requires stadium security for all 39 days of the tournament, not just match days. That pushes costs even higher.Terri Lawton, who owns Oake Knoll family farm near the stadium, told The U.S. Sun that the town is scared of being left with the bill.“I think the select board is doing a great job trying to protect residents,” she said.“We’re a very small town. We don’t have 8 million dollars to front and even if we did, we shouldn’t.”She added that spreading the cost across 18,000 residents would hurt basic services.“We wouldn’t be able to pay teachers, police, or firefighters. This isn’t emotional. It’s business.”Lawton believes Robert Kraft, whose wealth is estimated above 13 billion dollars, should step in.“If they want this to happen, the Kraft Group can simply write a check,” she said.Boston was allocated 46 million dollars from a federal funding plan, but delays and a federal shutdown have slowed payments through FEMA. Yunka said the Kraft Group is willing to front money equal to the expected grant, but that still leaves a gap of several million dollars.Under the current lease signed in 2000, Foxborough earns only 67 cents per ticket sold. Ticket prices have risen, but the town’s share has not changed.Fifa keeps most revenue from tickets, broadcasting, sponsorships, and parking. Meanwhile, host cities cover security, transport, and protection for officials including Fifa president Gianni Infantino.With the World Cup approaching, Foxborough leaders say they are not against soccer. They just cannot risk the town’s future.
Article Summary: The town of Foxborough, Massachusetts has refused to approve a license for World Cup matches at Gillette Stadium unless someone agrees to cover an 8 million dollar security bill. The stadium, home of the New England Patriots, is set to host seven matches starting June 13, including knockout games. Town leaders say they cannot risk bankruptcy to make it happen.

Article Title: Ja’Quan McMillan at center of Denver Broncos $5.8 million decision after controversial Josh Allen AFC Divisional interception
Article Text:
Ja’Quan McMillan at center of Denver Broncos $5.8 million decision after controversial Josh Allen AFC Divisional interception (Image via Getty)

Broncos make $5.8 million contract decision on Ja’Quan McMillan after controversial Josh Allen interception

Ja’Quan McMillan is not going anywhere and the Denver Broncos have made a big $5.8 million contract decision on the defensive back who was at the center of the controversial Josh Allen interception in the AFC Divisional Round. According to ESPN NFL insider Jeremy Fowler, Denver is placing a second round tender worth $5.8 million on cornerback Ja’Quan McMillan. “Broncos are placing the second-round tender ($5.8M) on CB Ja’Quan McMillan, per sources,” Jeremy Fowler reported on ESPN. This means the Broncos keep control of the 25-year-old defender for now. It also means if another NFL team wants to sign him, they would have to give Denver a second round draft pick if the Broncos decide not to match the offer.Denver already has one of the strongest defenses in the NFL. While many fans are talking about changes on offense this offseason, the front office clearly does not want to weaken the secondary. Some veterans like Alex Singleton and John Franklin-Myers are hitting free agency, but bringing back Ja’Quan McMillan may have been even more important for depth and stability.Ja’Quan McMillan has quietly built a strong NFL career since entering the league as an undrafted free agent out of East Carolina in 2022. Over four seasons, he has recorded six interceptions, including two returned for touchdowns. Since 2022, he has added 24 passes defended, 195 total tackles, 16 tackles for loss, seven sacks, and nine quarterback hits. Opposing quarterbacks have posted an 84.6 passer rating when targeting him.He was also part of the much talked about play involving Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen in the AFC Divisional Round. That interception sparked debate among fans, but it showed McMillan’s awareness and positioning in a huge playoff moment.With Patrick Surtain II, Riley Moss, and Jahdae Barron in the room, Denver’s cornerback group was viewed by many analysts as one of the best in football last season. Keeping Ja’Quan McMillan on the second round tender keeps that unit together.Here is how the tender works. McMillan can still talk to other teams. If a team offers him a contract, Denver can match it and keep him. If the Broncos choose not to match, they would receive a second round draft pick as compensation.In reality, giving up a second round pick is a high price. Because of that, many around the league believe Ja’Quan McMillan is likely to stay in Denver for at least one more season under the $5.8 million deal. The Broncos now move forward knowing one key piece of their defense remains in place.
Article Summary: Ja’Quan McMillan has quietly built a strong NFL career since entering the league as an undrafted free agent out of East Carolina in 2022. Over four seasons, he has recorded six interceptions, including two returned for touchdowns. He was also part of the much talked about play involving Buffalo Bills quarterback Josh Allen in the AFC Divisional Round.

Article Title: “I need to protect myself”: Olympian Chloe Kim makes a concerning post days after admitting fears about dating Myles Garrett publicly
Article Text:
Chloe Kim makes a concerning post days after admitting fears about dating Myles Garrett publicly.(Image via Getty Images)

Chloe Kim makes a shocking post as Myles Garrett maintains his distance from the drama

Chloe Kim has spoken out on her fears of dating Myles Garrett in the public eye



Myles Garrett, the Cleveland Browns’ star player, has sparked chaos with the love and commitment he has shown towards his girlfriend, the three time Olympian, Chloe Kim.While the world roots for Myles Garrett and Chloe Kim’s future, recently, she became more and more public about her love and their relationship. But it seems things have not been perfect since a few hours ago, the three time Olympian Chloe Kim posted a pretty concerning message.The three time Olympian, Chloe Kim, took to her Instagram story and made a shocking post.The Instagram story read as, “Hello Hello! Happy Friday! I unfortunately had to turn off my DMs due to people taking things too far…”The two time gold medalist added, “I’ve seen too many fake and very disturbing images/videos and I need to protect myself”.The 25 year old Olympian continued, “Hopefully with some time we’ll be back. I really do enjoy connecting with you all! Much love.”While it has not been confirmed what exactly Chloe Kim is referring to, it seems she has faced a few issues with going pretty public about her life and relationship.Chloe Kim’s boyfriend, the star NFL player and the Cleveland Browns’ defensive end, Myles Garrett, has stayed silent and maintained distance from the drama.To make matters worse, a few weeks ago, the three time Olympian Chloe Kim had admitted her fears about having a relationship with Myles Garrett in the public eye.Before she won her silver medal at the 2026 Winter Olympics in Italy, Chloe Kim spoke to TIME magazine about her high profile romance with Myles Garrett.Chloe Kim spoke out on the heartfelt kiss they shared in public and said, “I’ve never really been in a public relationship. So I think I've always been a little scared of it…But I did not know that that was going to happen.”The three time Olympian added, “I think it was a really sweet thing. No one's mad about it. Which is a good start.”While Chloe Kim has admitted her fears, the NFL star player, Myles Garrett, has not addressed this in public and has maintained his distance even though he continues to be supportive of his Olympian girlfriend and her achievements.
Article Summary: The three time Olympian, Chloe Kim, took to her Instagram story and made a shocking post. The two time gold medalist added, “I’ve seen too many fake and very disturbing images/videos and I need to protect myself” While it has not been confirmed what exactly Chloe Kim is referring to, it seems she has faced a few issues.

Article Title: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander: Is Shai Gilgeous-Alexander on a restriction? Oklahoma City Thunder superstar set for cautious return against Denver Nuggets in high-stakes clash
Article Text:
Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander. (Image via AP)

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander cleared to return but minutes likely monitored against Denver Nuggets

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander remains in the MVP race as the Oklahoma City Thunder race to the top

Tonight, the Denver Nuggets (37-22) head to the Paycom Center to play the Oklahoma City Thunder (45-15), a rematch of the exciting Western Conference semifinals from the previous year. OKC won the first encounter between these two teams this season, 121-111, in Denver, and this is only the second of four matchups.Fortunately, after a nine-game absence, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander is back. On Friday night, the Oklahoma City Thunder will meet the Denver Nuggets in a nationally televised game on ESPN, marking the superstar point guard's comeback from an abdominal strain. It's unclear, though, if Gilgeous-Alexander will have limited playing time throughout the match.ESPN will broadcast the Nuggets vs. Thunder game live on Friday from Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, at 9:30 p.m. ET. The Thunder have had a terrible season due to injuries. A crucial player returns tonight, but four of the Thunder's five starters have missed at least 11 games.Shai Gilgeous-Alexander, the current MVP, has received the all-clear to resume his abdominal injury. He has already missed 11 games, but he is still eligible for regular-season accolades if he misses six more.SGA is not yet on the team's injury report for Friday's game against the Denver Nuggets, according to Tim MacMahon of ESPN. As head coach Mark Daigneault attempts to ease his lead guard back into action, Gilgeous-Alexander, the current NBA MVP, will probably have his minutes monitored in some way even if he is off the injury report and will play a part in the game.However, Daigneault has not yet disclosed whether Gilgeous-Alexander will be subject to a minute restriction for the Denver game, which begins at 8:30 p.m. Central. The Thunder are still leading the Western Conference, after all. Their star player does not need to return to the court right away.However, considering that the Thunder's superior depth has shown itself able to handle his absence over the past several weeks, it is realistic to expect that Gilgeous-Alexander will be limited to about 25 minutes.Gilgeous-Alexander needs to miss just six more games this season to meet the NBA's 65-game requirement and be eligible for MVP and other postseason honors. The Thunder, however, had a 5-4 record in their nine games without SGA. Oklahoma City continues to hold the top spot in the Western Conference, two games ahead of San Antonio. Nonetheless, the Spurs hold the season tiebreaker between the two teams and have won ten straight games.Jalen Williams, an All-NBA forward, and Ajay Mitchell, an important role player, are still absent from the Thunder. However, Gilgeous-Alexander is within striking distance of Luka Doncic of the Los Angeles Lakers in the scoring battle after averaging 31.8 points per game in 49 games this season.
Article Summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander has returned to the Oklahoma City Thunder after a nine- game absence due to an abdominal strain. He is not yet on the team's injury report for Friday's game against the Denver Nuggets. It's unclear if he will be subject to a minute restriction. The Thunder are still leading the Western Conference, after all.
